author: Murat
description: Send vault reminders and captured app notices to ntfy with auto scan, editable queues, delayed notifications, repeats, and optional AI webhooks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Ntfy Notifications

name: Ntfy Notifications

releases.author: arias007
releases.description: - Fix status bar reminder counts to show red/yellow reminders over total notification tasks.\n- Add automatic status count refresh on startup, note edits, scan completion, and scan interval.\n- Keep support QR settings localized and bundled.

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Schedule reminders directly with ntfy and cancel edited reminders.

- Reminders inside the ntfy scheduling window, default 3 days, are handed off to ntfy immediately.
- Date-only, daily-note, and overdue unsent tasks are scheduled for the daily batch time, default 08:00.
- Turning off a reminder with the bell button cancels the matching ntfy scheduled message when possible.
- Editing the same task line cancels the old scheduled ntfy message before the new one is saved.

Assets:
- main.js
- styles.css
- manifest.json

releases.author: arias007
releases.description:
Daily batch reminders and ntfy scheduled controls.

- Date-only, daily-note, and overdue unsent tasks use the daily batch time, default 08:00.
- Markdown changes trigger a short automatic rescan so new dated tasks enter the queue.
- Scheduled ntfy messages use a stable X-Message-ID and can be refreshed/cancelled from the manager when supported by the server.
- Settings include two optional local support QR image fields.

Assets:
- main.js
- styles.css
- manifest.json
